name: ref
description: Look up a pin and show its scope level

name: list
description: Show all active pins for current project

name: context
description: Dump compact project pin table for model injection

name: define
description: Define a pin at the given scope level
example: codec --scope project define auth authentication and session management

name: crystal
description: Seal current chat scope as a BLAKE3-addressed Crystal checkpoint

name: load
description: Resume from Crystal checkpoint by hash prefix

name: conflicts
description: Show pins defined at multiple scope levels with different labels

name: promote
description: Promote a pin one scope level up

resolution: chat → user → project → global, first hit wins
